market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Private keys, not smart contracts, caused 40% of crypto's $16 billion hack losses. Here's whats being done.
articles.description: The industry is moving toward fixing the private key vulnerability issue, just not evenly, Wish Wu, co-founder and CEO of Pharos, said.

articles.title: White House to speak with law enforcement groups to push Crypto's Clarity Act
articles.description: Officials from the White House are said to be sitting down with law enforcement representatives who have objected to illicit-finance portions of the bill.

articles.title: J.P. Morgan broadens blockchain settlement network as banks modernize cross-border payments
articles.description: The bank added five Asia-Pacific currencies to its Kinexys blockchain platform, allowing institutional clients to settle payments and FX around the clock.

articles.title: Crypto analytics firm Chainalysis proposes standards for blockchain tracing
articles.description: The blockchain analysis company published a proposed ontology for how investigators can identify clusters of crypto addresses and link them together.

articles.title: MiCA's looming deadline could leave 10 million crypto users without a platform in the EU
articles.description: As MiCA takes full effect on July 1, SwissBorg's Alex Fazel told CoinDesk users should choose platforms built to withstand EU regulators' tightening oversight.

articles.title: Rocket Lab continues buying spree by acquiring satellite company Iridium
articles.description: The all-stock deal values Iridium at $8 billion, and gives Rocket Lab even more firepower to compete against Amazon and SpaceX.

articles.title: Ripple wants institutions to borrow against tokenized assets on XRPL
articles.description: A proposed XRPL standard would let institutions borrow against tokenized assets, with the blockchain enforcing loan terms while the underwriting stays with human credit teams. It still needs validator approval to go live.

articles.title: Can AI drain DeFi? Separating Claude Mythos hype from reality
articles.description: Claude Mythos has raised concerns about AI-driven attacks on DeFi protocols. However, the same AI tools are also available to security teams, not just attackers.

articles.title: Wall Street's BNY expands stablecoin services for institutions, starting with Circle's USDC
articles.description: The world's largest custody bank is adding USDC custody and minting services as stablecoins move deeper into traditional finance.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Strategy opens door to selling billions of bitcoin under new capital plan. Here's what it means
articles.description: The company can now sell bitcoin to fund the USD reserve, support preferred dividends, and finance up to $2 billion in stock buybacks.

articles.title: 愛因斯坦探針抓到目前最難分類的 X 射線閃焰，像伽瑪射線暴但沒有伽瑪射線
articles.description: 愛因斯坦探針衛星（Einstein Probe，EP）發現的暫現源 EP240305a，展現前所未見的觀測特徵 […]

articles.title: Ukraine transfers $8.3 million in seized crypto amid potential plans for strategic reserve
articles.description: The funds were seized during an investigation into an international hacker group accused of laundering proceeds from data theft through high-value property.

articles.title: BlackRock pushes deeper into DeFi with Ethena integration, sending ENA up 8%
articles.description: The deal adds Ethena's yield-generating token to BlackRock's risk management platform and create a $100 million liquidity facility for BlackRock's tokenized money market fund.

articles.title: Robot hand company settles Tesla trade secret suit and announces $11M raise
articles.description: The startup, Proception, is taking a unique approach to collecting training data to tackle one of the hardest problems in robotics: hands.

articles.title: From Bitcoin critics to blockchain believers: The 5 biggest crypto backflips
articles.description: If you can't beat 'em, join 'em. Here are five crypto skeptics who have reluctantly embraced the opportunity of making loads of money with blockchain.

articles.title: Pocket raises $11M in bet on rising demand for AI note-taking devices
articles.description: Pocket sells a $129 credit card-shaped puck, which sticks to the back of your phone, and promises unlimited recordings, transcriptions, and to-do items.

articles.title: Strategy unveils capital framework to preserve Bitcoin exposure, pay dividends
articles.description: Michael Saylor’s Strategy unveiled a capital framework allowing Bitcoin sales to fund dividends, a $2.55 billion reserve and buybacks while raising STRC payout to 12%.

articles.title: Breez launches Bitcoin-to-stablecoin payments across more than 30 blockchains
articles.description: The new SDK feature lets developers route payments from Bitcoin balances to recipients in USDC and USDT without requiring users to hold stablecoins.

articles.title: Flipper Device’s new Busy Bar is a customizable display for productivity
articles.description: Flipper Device's new Busy Bar will retail for $249.
